filtered_articles.title: MTG Marvel Super Heroes Set Has Launched with Huge Amazon Discounts Already Up for Grabs
filtered_articles.description: Magic: The Gathering's Marvel Super Heroes set has officially launched, and Amazon is already offering massive 40% discounts on Play Booster boxes and gear.

filtered_articles.title: Pokémon TCG: Prismatic Evolutions ETBs Are Back in Stock, and Under Market Price at Amazon
filtered_articles.description: Amazon has restocked Pokémon TCG: Prismatic Evolutions Elite Trainer Boxes at under market price, but they are likely to sell out fast.
